sentences.arabic: افْتَتَحَتِ المَدِينَةُ مَرْكَزاً تِجَارِيّاً جَدِيداً فِي وَسَطِ العَاصِمَةِ.
sentences.translation: Grad je otvorio novi tržni centar u centru prijestonice.
sentences.translationEn: The city opened a new commercial center in the middle of the capital.

sentences.arabic: يَحْتَوِي المَرْكَزُ عَلَى مَتَاجِرَ لِلْمَلَابِسِ وَالإِلِكْتُرُونِيَّاتِ.
sentences.translation: Centar sadrži prodavnice odjeće i elektronike.
sentences.translationEn: The center contains shops for clothes and electronics.

sentences.arabic: زَارَ آلَافُ النَّاسِ المَكَانَ فِي اليَوْمِ الأَوَّلِ.
sentences.translation: Hiljade ljudi posjetilo je mjesto prvog dana.
sentences.translationEn: Thousands of people visited the place on the first day.

sentences.arabic: يَهْدِفُ هَذَا المَشْرُوعُ إِلَى تَوْفِيرِ فُرَصِ عَمَلٍ لِلشَّبَابِ.
sentences.translation: Ovaj projekat ima za cilj pružanje prilika za posao mladima.
sentences.translationEn: This project aims to provide job opportunities for young people.

sentences.arabic: تَتَوَقَّعُ الحُكُومَةُ نُمُوَّ الِاقْتِصَادِ المَحَلِّيِّ بِسُرْعَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Vlada očekuje da će lokalna ekonomija brzo rasti.
sentences.translationEn: The government expects the local economy to grow quickly.
